'''ây-w-k''' ('''kayawak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kneeboard|kneeboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kneeboard|kneeboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-w-k
|-
! Lemma
| kayawak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyawak|thiyawak]] || [[word:jiyawak|jiyawak]] || [[word:shiyawak|shiyawak]] || [[word:kiyawak|kiyawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyawak|thuthuyawak]] || [[word:jujuyawak|jujuyawak]] || [[word:shushuyawak|shushuyawak]] || [[word:kukuyawak|kukuyawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyawak|thuyawak]] || [[word:juyawak|juyawak]] || [[word:shuyawak|shuyawak]] || [[word:kuyawak|kuyawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyawak|thuyawak]] || [[word:juyawak|juyawak]] || [[word:shuyawak|shuyawak]] || [[word:kuyawak|kuyawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyawak|theyawak]] || [[word:jeyawak|jeyawak]] || [[word:sheyawak|sheyawak]] || [[word:keyawak|keyawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyawak|thothoyawak]] || [[word:jojoyawak|jojoyawak]] || [[word:shoshoyawak|shoshoyawak]] || [[word:kokoyawak|kokoyawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyawak|thoyawak]] || [[word:joyawak|joyawak]] || [[word:shoyawak|shoyawak]] || [[word:koyawak|koyawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyawak|thoyawak]] || [[word:joyawak|joyawak]] || [[word:shoyawak|shoyawak]] || [[word:koyawak|koyawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyawak|thĂŠyawak]] || [[word:jĂŠyawak|jĂŠyawak]] || [[word:shĂŠyawak|shĂŠyawak]] || [[word:kĂŠyawak|kĂŠyawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayawak|thathayawak]] || [[word:jajayawak|jajayawak]] || [[word:shashayawak|shashayawak]] || [[word:kakayawak|kakayawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayawak|thayawak]] || [[word:jayawak|jayawak]] || [[word:shayawak|shayawak]] || [[word:kayawak|kayawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayawak|thayawak]] || [[word:jayawak|jayawak]] || [[word:shayawak|shayawak]] || [[word:kayawak|kayawak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayawak|shayawak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayawak|goshayawak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayawak|gokishayawak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayawaknĂŒ|shayawaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayawaknknĂŒ|goshayawaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayawaknĂŒ|gokishayawaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayawakshĂ«|shayawakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayawaknkshĂ«|goshayawaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayawakshĂ«|gokishayawakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayawakro|shayawakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayawaknkro|goshayawaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayawakro|gokishayawakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayawakmu|shayawakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayawaknkmu|goshayawaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayawakmu|gokishayawakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayawaksher|shayawaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayawaknksher|goshayawaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayawaksher|gokishayawaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayawakng|shayawakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayawaknkng|goshayawaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayawakng|gokishayawakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayawakya|shayawakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayawaknkya|goshayawaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayawakya|gokishayawakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayawakyam|shayawakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayawaknkyam|goshayawaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayawakyam|gokishayawakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayawaknĂŒshĂ«|shayawaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayawaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshayawaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayawaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishayawaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayawaknĂŒro|shayawaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayawaknknĂŒro|goshayawaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayawaknĂŒro|gokishayawaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayawaknĂŒmu|shayawaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayawaknknĂŒmu|goshayawaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayawaknĂŒmu|gokishayawaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayawakshĂ«nĂŒ|shayawakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayawaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayawaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayawakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayawakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayawakshĂ«ro|shayawakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayawaknkshĂ«ro|goshayawaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayawakshĂ«ro|gokishayawakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayawakshĂ«mu|shayawakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayawaknkshĂ«mu|goshayawaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayawakshĂ«mu|gokishayawakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayawakronĂŒ|shayawakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayawaknkronĂŒ|goshayawaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayawakronĂŒ|gokishayawakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayawakroshĂ«|shayawakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayawaknkroshĂ«|goshayawaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayawakroshĂ«|gokishayawakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayawakromu|shayawakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayawaknkromu|goshayawaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayawakromu|gokishayawakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayawakmunĂŒ|shayawakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayawaknkmunĂŒ|goshayawaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayawakmunĂŒ|gokishayawakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayawakmushĂ«|shayawakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayawaknkmushĂ«|goshayawaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayawakmushĂ«|gokishayawakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayawakmuro|shayawakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayawaknkmuro|goshayawaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayawakmuro|gokishayawakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
